# Muhammad Sufyan — Frontend Developer

> Muhammad Sufyan is a Frontend Developer based in Lahore, Pakistan with 1.5+ years of experience building fast, responsive, and production-ready web applications using React and Next.js.

## About

Muhammad Sufyan started his web development journey in 2024 at Ehsas Lab, where he completed a 6-month intensive programme and went on to become an instructor. He is currently a Frontend Developer at Ehya Education, working on production systems used by thousands of students and faculty in Pakistan.

He has built education platforms, corporate websites, SaaS-style frontends, and AI-powered interfaces.

## Skills

- React.js, Next.js, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, CSS3, HTML5
- Redux, Zod, REST API integration
- Git, GitHub, GitLab, Vercel, Netlify
- Responsive design, performance optimisation, Core Web Vitals

- [Contact](https://sufyan-frontend.vercel.app/contact) — Hire Muhammad Sufyan for freelance or full-time frontend work
